song.title: Gathered in Thy Name
song.author: C. A. W.
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C Gathered in Thy name, Lord Jesus, .G D Losing sight of all but Thee, .G C O what joy Thy presence gives us, .C D G Calling up our hearts to Thee!
[V2] Loved with love which knows no measure, Save the Father’s love to Thee. Blessed Lord, our hearts would treasure All the Father’s thoughts of Thee.
[V3] All His joy, His rest, His pleasure, All His deep delight in Thee, Lord, Thy heart alone can measure What Thy Father found in Thee.
[V4] How He set His love upon Thee, Called Thee His beloved Son. Yet for us He did not spare Thee, By Thy death our life was won.
[V5] O the joy, the wondrous singing, When we see Thee as thou art! Thy blest name, Lord Jesus, bringing Sweetest music to God’s heart.
[V6] Notes of gladness, songs unceasing, Hymns of everlasting praise, Psalms of glory, joy increasing Through God’s endless day of days.
